## [00:00 - 03:03]

So now I want to talk about your launch goals because as the saying goes if you don't know where you're going any road will get you there so product launch formula can really it can serve a lot of things in your business that can build your business quickly but Depending on exactly what you want out of your launch Then it's going to it's going to alter your strategy going forward So you can't create a great strategy until you figure out where you want to go Okay, so this is the first question that I asked my private clients What do you want to get out of your launch? One of my favorite questions is what's a home run for you? And you have to know this before you can design your strategy and you can have more than one goal You can have a primary goal and you can also have secondary goals and those goals will definitely Impact what you do in your launch what your launch strategy is so there's two uber big goals that sort of They they Well, let me just get right to them They tend to be the the two forks in the road one of them is money You know and a lot of people just assume that a launch is always about money, but it's not always the case But if it is about money then that's awesome And I have definitely done launches that were about the money. It's like I needed to make some money I need to bring in some money, you know, I as we get deeper in the course I'll share with you a quick launch where I got a tax bill and I wanted to make the money to pay the tax bill You know, I had another launch where I wanted to finish the basement So I did a launch to finish the basement and then I had another launch that frankly was Give me the down payment for the house that I'm living in right now So if it's about the money for you and and certainly for a long time it was about the money for me I was just trying to support my family and and create a better lifestyle for my family and allow my wife to come home and be with The kids more so it's fine if it's about the money and if it is then own it say Yeah, I just I want to make X number of dollars. I or I'm just in this I need to make this money to get this goal. So that is fine Now a lot of launches fit into what I call the save the world category and this is where people It's really not so much about the money. They just really want to get their work out in the world They want to help people they want to make an impact Lots and lots of PLF launches fall in this category if and when you come to PLF live The thing you're gonna walk in there You're gonna think this is just all about marketing marketing marketing and we give you lots of great marketing But you're gonna meet a lot of people in there that are doing some amazing world changing things So a lot of launches fall into the save the world category One important thing is this doesn't preclude making money you know the thing is is it's hard to save the world if you don't have the money and Really end up everyone a lot of times they start off with you know I want to make the money and then they move towards purpose. They want to have a greater purpose they want to save the world but the reality is you need the money both ways and Usually when people even if they are just about the money often they will evolve more towards purpose

It could be to create a product That's really what the seed launch is all about is about creating a product So when you first do a seed launch, it's not you're not gonna make a ton of money on a seed launch You know, you can make thousands you might even make 10 or 20,000 But it's not gonna be you know, the launch that's gonna, you know, set you up for life But it does allow you to create a product and create your first list You it's also great for building your list You might do a launch that is specifically just around building either your client list or your prospect list or both And you know, we're gonna be getting into all this as we go through the program, but just I'm just giving you different Potential goals for your launch another one could be just to gather data You can really create you gather all kinds of great market data Figure out what the best squeeze pages and the headlines in the offer You can use your comments to help with your offers and copy and in fact You will no matter what kind of launch you do or what your launch goals are You are gonna gather all kinds of data and you're gonna learn an amazing amount that first time you go through a launch One of the most this is that launch conversation when you see what people are reacting to
